title: HistoryResult
description: Return value of IConnector.loadHistory(). Older messages are prepended to the message store. Source: packages/core/src/domain/entities/Message.ts.

messages.description: Page of older messages, ordered oldest-first.

hasMore.description: True if more pages remain. The widget shows the load-more spinner accordingly.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor passed back to load the next (older) page.
